publishedAbstract: - When integrating external Ceph with OpenShift Data Foundation, the Ceph cluster is hosted outside the OpenShift SDN. By default, OVN-Kubernetes uses restricted IP forwarding, which prevents pod traffic from being forwarded to external networks.- As a result:- Pods cannot route traffic to external Ceph MON/OSD IPs- Ceph external integration fails or remains in a degraded state
publishedTitle: External Ceph integration with ODF is Failing.
